x-enumeration-literals.name: Asset Owner
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person owns the asset or item and places it in safe keeping for protection.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Custodian
x-enumeration-literals.description: The bank or financial institution responsible for holding, safeguarding, and managing the asset on behalf of the depositor.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Beneficiary
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or entity entitled to receive the asset under agreed conditions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: Government or official bodies that oversee safe keeping practices, ensuring compliance with laws, security, and fiduciary responsibilities.
